message:
refactor(cleanup): deep cx threading through cleanup_preview_with_cx + cleanup_apply_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Eleventh caller-migration tick in the strangler-fig phase. Largest
single migration so far — 17 distinct storage call-sites converted.

Five prerequisite storage cx-first siblings added first:
- `record_maintenance_with_cx(cx, record)`
- `count_events_by_tier_with_cx(cx, ...)`
- `count_notification_history_before_with_cx(cx, before_ts)`
- `delete_events_before_with_cx(cx, before_ts, batch_size)`
- `delete_events_by_tier_with_cx(cx, ...)`

Storage cx-first coverage now at 61/140 methods.

Two new private cleanup helpers added:
- `preview_events_by_tier_with_cx(cx, storage, config, now)` — uses
  `count_events_before_with_cx` + `count_events_by_tier_with_cx`.
- `apply_events_by_tier_with_cx(cx, storage, config, now)` — uses
  `count_events_before_with_cx` + `delete_events_before_with_cx` +
  `count_events_by_tier_with_cx` + `delete_events_by_tier_with_cx`.

Two pub `_with_cx` fns upgraded:

1. `cleanup_preview_with_cx` — events_by_tier helper + 4 table
   count queries (segments/audit/usage/notification) all now use
   cx-first siblings.

2. `cleanup_apply_with_cx` — events_by_tier helper + 4 (count,
   prune) pairs (segments/audit/usage/notification) + the trailing
   `record_maintenance_with_cx` for the maintenance log. All 9
   storage calls in the body now cx-first.

Legacy `cleanup_preview`, `cleanup_apply`, `preview_events_by_tier`,
`apply_events_by_tier` preserved unchanged.

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target, --features asupersync-runtime): 96/96
cleanup tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
